def normalize_email(value):
    value = value.strip()
    value = value.lower()
    if "+" in value:
        local, domain = value.split("@")
        local = local.split("+")[0]
        value = local + "@" + domain
    return value

source_code:
class Slugifier
  def self.slugify(text)
    text = text.downcase.strip
    text = text.gsub(" ", "-")
    text = text.gsub(/[^a-z0-9\-]/, "")
    text
  end
end
tests:
require_relative "source"
require "minitest/autorun"

class SlugifierTest < Minitest::Test
  def test_basic
    assert_equal "hello-world", Slugifier.slugify("Hello World")
  end

  def test_strip
    assert_equal "hello", Slugifier.slugify("  Hello  ")
  end

  def test_symbols_removed
    assert_equal "hello-world", Slugifier.slugify("Hello @ World!")
  end
end

task: Refactor this function while preserving exact return values.
source_code:
<?php
function status_label($active, $verified) {
    if (!$active) {
        return "inactive";
    }
    if ($verified) {
        return "active_verified";
    }
    return "active_pending";
}
tests:
<?php
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

final class StatusLabelTest extends TestCase {
    public function testInactive() {
        $this->assertSame("inactive", status_label(false, false));
    }

    public function testVerified() {
        $this->assertSame("active_verified", status_label(true, true));
    }

    public function testPending() {
        $this->assertSame("active_pending", status_label(true, false));
    }
}
